arts.ttl: UEFA make huge Conference League fixture announcement impacting Chelsea and Tottenham
arts.sum: As a result, UEFA have confirmed that, in the event that Chelsea reach the quarter-final of the Conference League and Tottenham progress to the last eight of the Europa League, then the Blues would see their home and away legs reversed. As things stand, both Chelsea and Tottenham would face home fixtures in the first leg of their quarter-final ties, provided they get past Copenhagen and Alkmaar, respectively.

arts.ttl: Chelsea Transfer News Today: Guehi makes SURPRISE decision as Maresca issues brutal message
arts.sum: FootballTransfers runs through all the latest Chelsea transfer news, rumours and gossip, including updates on Marc Guehi and Cole Palmer . Arsenal’s pursuit of RB Leipzig forward Benjamin Sesko could inadvertently deny Chelsea the chance to sign Ipswich Town forward Liam Delap this summer.

arts.ttl: Chelsea predicted lineup vs Southampton - Premier League
arts.sum: Chelsea's predicted lineup for their upcoming Premier League clash against Southampton on Tuesday night.

arts.ttl: Chelsea predicted XI vs Southampton includes three changes as Enzo Maresca gives youngster first Premier League start
Chelsea eye HUGE summer deal with Barcelona 'ready to sell'
arts.sum: Barcelona are ready to sell Alejandro Balde this summer amid interest from Chelsea and Newcastle United, according to reports in Spain. That is according to Spanish publication Todo Fichajes, who claim that both Chelsea and Newcastle are closely monitoring Balde’s situation at Camp Nou as they ponder a possible summer bid.

arts.ttl: Three midfielders Chelsea should now target after Kobbie Mainoo update, including Premier League star 'on a par' with Moises Caicedo
Premier League GW27 predictions: Man City edge Tottenham thriller, big wins for Chelsea, Man United
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes on Clement of French indie pop band Kids Return for a Premier League predictions challenge in gameweek 27 of the 2023-24 season.

arts.ttl: Chelsea Transfer News: Blues schedule meeting with agent of 18-year-old wonderkid Ian Subiabre
arts.sum: Last week, it was revealed that Chelsea were in talks with 19-year-old Wolfsburg midfielder Kofi Amoako over a summer move despite the wealth of options already at the club and currently out on loan. Chelsea will hold talks with the agent of River Plate youngster Ian Subiabre next week, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Official statement reveals how Tottenham could help Chelsea win UEFA Conference League this season
Chelsea, Liverpool, Man City & Man Utd target €90m Juventus star
arts.sum: Juventus could be forced to sell one of their star players this summer, with a host of Premier League clubs interested.
